Off Calendar Jun-25-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jianlin Song of SINUNU BRUNI 415.362.9700, appearing for defendant/moving party Timec Company, Inc.

Kimberly Chu of Brayton Purcell LLP 415.898.1555, appearing for plaintiffs/opposing parties Diane Sowers, Individually, as Wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor-in-Interest to Jack Donald Sowers, Deceased, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT TIMEC COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Argument held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling: Defendant Timec Company, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant sustained its initial burden. Mr. Clifton's deposition testimony and declaration and Mr. Ay's declaration create a triable issue whether Jack Sowers was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials (insulation) attributable to defendant. Defendant's objections to plaintiffs' supplemental response to special interrogatories are sustained and its objections to the declarations of Mr. Clifton and Mr. Ay and the deposition testimony of Mr. Clifton are overruled. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Court Reporter: Kimberly L. Avery of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #5074 (Tel: 510-451-1580). (503/TLJ)
